Prompt
U
Oracle Events
OE 1: Search emails using search_emails with query related to "GreenStack" or "surcharge" or "hazmat" or "Derek Hollis" (or similar) to find GreenStack invoice and surcharge discussions. Expected findings: greenstack_hana_finance_invoice_flag (Hana to marcus.thorne@moveops.com, subject "GreenStack Energy Invoice INV-2026-0418 — Non-Standard Line Items Need Margin Review", body details: total $9,440, hazmat transport surcharge $1,800 with no comparable, overweight equipment surcharge $950, interim hazmat storage $1,650 PENDING CLIENT APPROVAL awaiting Derek Hollis, April 25 fiscal deadline, asks Marcus about margin review), GreenStack relocation emails from Emeka including greenstack_hazmat_reloc_request and greenstack_hazmat_reloc_details (Derek Hollis's original April 1 relocation request covering Mei-Lin Zhao Houston-to-Portland with lithium-ion modules and Joaquín Reyes Phoenix-to-Seattle with 900-lb solar rig). No email from Derek Hollis explicitly approving the $1,650 storage surcharge should be found - the approval remains pending.
OE 2: Search emails using search_emails with query related to "NorthWind" or "piano" or "chain-of-custody" or "KeyMove" or "Emilia Cruz" (or similar) to find NorthWind billing and damage claim correspondence. Expected findings: email_pam_denver_relocation_request (Pam Kowalski's original request for Raj Patel and Emilia Cruz Denver relocations, including Steinway Model B piano and server lab chain-of-custody), email_victor_ciso_security_requirements (Victor Huang's chain-of-custody security requirements for Raj Patel server lab), email_email_1f1459bff84c (Craig Nguyen from KeyMove to blessing.okafor@moveops.com with Steinway damage photos and extraction notes), email_email_99e10a978b48 (Marcus to david.chen@moveops.com with CC to catalina and chloe about KeyMove $1,200 insurance rider for Emilia Cruz piano damage claim), email_northwind_survey (Pam's Q1 CSAT survey response: 5/10 overall, 4/10 communication, would not recommend, mentions poor apartment quality and delayed responses), email_email_ab22f67eeeb0 (Catalina's promise to Pam of service recovery plan by end of week referencing chain-of-custody breakdown and piano damage).
OE 3: Search Slack using conversations_search_messages with search_query related to "GreenStack" or "surcharge" or "hazmat" (or similar) to check for #finance channel discussions about the GreenStack invoice. Expected findings: No detailed Slack post from Hana about GreenStack invoice INV-2026-0418 surcharges exists in #finance — the GreenStack invoice was flagged to Marcus via email only (see OE 1). The agent may find earlier GreenStack invoice posts in #finance (NMX-2026-0033 for Priya Venkatesh at $7,289 posted February 6, and INV-2026-0303 at $5,000 posted March 23) but neither covers the April hazmat/storage surcharges. Note: a separate Canopy Health invoice post (INV-2026-0401, $9,210) with surcharge discussion exists in #finance from April 4 with a Marcus reply (ts 1775336580), but this is a different client and should not be confused with GreenStack.
OE 4: Search Slack using conversations_search_messages with search_query related to "NorthWind" or "INV-2026-0412" or "provisional" or "chain-of-custody" or "piano" (or similar) to find #finance channel discussions about the NorthWind invoice. Expected findings: Hana's NorthWind INV-2026-0412 breakdown posted in #finance (C005) on April 11 with questions about chain-of-custody provisional pricing ($1,200), specialty piano moving ($2,200), comparison to NorthWind's original $12,000/move enterprise rate, and hazmat/piano vendor quotes.
OE 5: Search QuickBooks for GreenStack invoices using quickbooks_search_invoices (criteria related to "GreenStack" or similar). Expected finding: inv_greenstack_apr2026_zhao_reyes (DocNumber INV-2026-0418, TotalAmt $9,440, DueDate 2026-04-25, Balance $9,440, 10 line items including: apartment sourcing x2 $2,000, flight bookings x2 $40, moving coordination x2 $1,000, hazmat transport surcharge $1,800, interim hazmat storage $1,650 with "PENDING CLIENT APPROVAL" in description, overweight equipment surcharge $950, stipend platform $2,000).
OE 6: Search QuickBooks for NorthWind invoices using quickbooks_search_invoices (criteria related to "NorthWind" or similar). Expected findings: inv_northwind_denver_02 (DocNumber INV-2026-0412, TotalAmt $14,700, DueDate 2026-05-01, Balance $14,700, 6 line items including: standard relocation Raj Patel $4,500, hazmat handling surcharge lithium UPS $1,800, chain-of-custody security protocol $1,200 with "PROVISIONAL" in description, standard relocation Emilia Cruz $4,500, specialty piano moving $2,200 with "PROVISIONAL" in description, early lease termination negotiation $500). Also inv_northwind_01 (DocNumber INV-2026-003, TotalAmt $60,000, earlier NorthWind enterprise relocation invoice).
OE 7: Search QuickBooks for KeyMove bills using quickbooks_search_bills (criteria related to "KeyMove" or "piano" or similar). Expected finding: BILL-KEYMOVE-2026-0417 (DocNumber KM-44192-ICR, TotalAmt $1,200, DueDate 2026-04-24, Balance $1,200, description: "Insurance claim rider for Emilia Cruz Steinway piano scratch during stairwell extraction", VendorRef VEND-KEYMOVE-001 / KeyMove Specialty Transport).
OE 8: Search CRM for NorthWind company and deals using crm_search_companies (name: "NorthWind" or similar), then crm_search_deals. Expected findings: NorthWind company record, deal_northwind_denver_expansion_v2 (dealname "NorthWind Technologies -- Denver Satellite Office Expansion", amount $14,700, dealstage contractSent, description includes INV-2026-0412, provisional line items, chain-of-custody protocol, Steinway piano, ACCOUNT RECOVERY context with Q1 CSAT 5/10).
OE 9: Search Airtable for GreenStack and NorthWind relocation records using airtable_list_bases, then airtable_list_tables (base_id: appMoveOpsOps001), then airtable_search_records (base_id: appMoveOpsOps001, table_name: "Relocations", field_name: "Company", value: "GreenStack Energy" or "NorthWind Technologies"). Expected findings: GreenStack records for Mei-Lin Zhao (Houston to Portland, HAZMAT Class 9 lithium-ion, interim storage gap April 17-28) and Joaquín Reyes (Phoenix to Seattle, 900-lb solar rig, building shutdown April 14-18). NorthWind records for Raj Patel (Chicago to Denver, server lab, chain-of-custody) and Emilia Cruz (Chicago to Denver, Steinway piano, lease overlap).
OE 10: Search Linear for NorthWind-related tickets using linear_list_issues (query: "NorthWind" or "piano" or "chain-of-custody" or "provisional" or similar). Expected findings: linear_issue_c8cdba4408f1 (title: "NorthWind retention response plan after April escalations", issue number 482, state_id null, assignee moveops_david_chen - this covers account recovery but NOT the billing provisional items or piano damage claim). No existing ticket specifically tracks the provisional billing amounts or the KeyMove piano claim from a finance perspective.
OE 11: Look up Emeka Diallo's email using contacts_search_contacts (query: "Emeka Diallo"). Expected finding: emeka.diallo@moveops.com.
OE 12: Look up Marcus Thorne's email using contacts_search_contacts (query: "Marcus Thorne"). Expected finding: marcus.thorne@moveops.com.
OE 13: Send email (via send_email) with sender hana.kim@moveops.com, recipients including emeka.diallo@moveops.com, cc including marcus.thorne@moveops.com, subject referencing GreenStack invoice surcharge approval or fiscal deadline follow-up (or similar), content covering: (a) whether Derek Hollis has approved the $1,650 interim storage surcharge, (b) whether the GreenStack invoice can be finalized given the April 25 deadline has passed, (c) note that Marcus still owes the margin review on the $1,800 hazmat surcharge rate.
OE 14: Post a message in #finance (via conversations_add_message with channel_id C005 and payload containing the reconciliation summary) covering: (a) GreenStack INV-2026-0418 status - $9,440 total, $1,650 storage pending approval, April 25 deadline passed, (b) NorthWind INV-2026-0412 status - $14,700 total, $3,400 in provisional items ($1,200 chain-of-custody + $2,200 piano), KeyMove $1,200 piano damage claim affecting the billing picture, (c) any other open April billing items.
OE 15: Create a Linear ticket (via linear_create_issue with team, title, and description) for NorthWind billing provisional items and piano damage tracking - covering the $1,200 chain-of-custody and $2,200 piano provisional amounts needing vendor finalization, and the $1,200 KeyMove piano damage insurance claim that may offset or adjust the billing.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

outcome

2 The email to [emeka.diallo@moveops.com](mailto:emeka.diallo@moveops.com) (visible in the send_email content parameter) asks whether Derek Hollis has approved or signed off on the $1,650 interim hazmat storage charge (or similar).
outcome
 ✓✓✓✓✓✓ 100%
✓Run #1The email content explicitly asks 'Has Derek signed off on this line item?' about the '$1,650 (Line 5)' interim hazmat storage charge that was 'PENDING DEREK HOLLIS APPROVAL'. Also asks 'Whether Derek has approved the $1,650 storage charge' in the confirmation list.
✓Run #2The email content explicitly asks 'Has Derek signed off on this charge?' regarding the interim hazmat storage charge, and includes a bullet: 'Whether Derek has approved the $1,650 storage charge'.
✓Run #3The email content explicitly includes 'INTERIM HAZMAT STORAGE — $1,650 (Line 5): This line item...was explicitly marked as pending Derek Hollis's approval...Has Derek signed off on this charge?' and asks Emeka to confirm whether he followed up with Derek on the storage charge approval.
✓Run #4The email content explicitly asks about the '$1,650 line item for DOT-compliant temperature-controlled storage... was explicitly marked as pending Derek's sign-off. Has Derek approved this charge?' directly referencing Derek Hollis and the $1,650 storage charge approval.
